pages.text_excerpt: News | Dr Caroline Johnson Skip to main content Main navigation Home About Caroline News In Parliament My Plan Contact Privacy Policy News Change of Consultation End Date for Cliff Villages Medical Practice Dispensary Monday, 16 March, 2026 Since my last update, Lincolnshire ICB have informed me that the deadline to complete the survey for the Cliff Villages Medical Practice Dispensary is now 12 noon on Tuesday 24 March. The details are copied here and the link for the survey can be found in the comments below. Paper copies of the survey are available at the practice and these should also be returned by 12 noon on Tuesday 24 March... h2: What is RSS?
h3: Dr Caroline Johnson Sleaford and North Hykeham
h2: Footer
pages.text_excerpt: About RSS | Dr Caroline Johnson MP Skip to main content Main navigation Home About Caroline News In Parliament My Plan Contact Privacy Policy About RSS RSS feeds and news syndication News feeds Events feeds You can read the latest news from this website using your news reader, or display them on your own website using RSS (Rich Site Summary) XML documents, wherever you see the orange RSS symbol. What is RSS? RSS is a defacto XML standard invented by Netscape for news distribution, now used by thousands of sites. RSS is an open format that uses a simple set of XML tags to define a news "channel" that allows any site to provide basic meta-information about your new content (headline, link, description). Whenever you use our RSS feeds publicly (where anyone but yourself would be reading them), you should provide proper attribution to this website. We cannot provide advice or technical support in the coding and integration of our RSS feeds into your site or software. Additionally we ask that you cache the RSS feed and do not query more than once in any hour.
